name: Heroic Destiny
entries: Great deeds lie in your future, and it will take extraordinary effort to kill you before you accomplish those deeds. Choose or roll a random destiny using the Heroic Destiny table. Additionally, you gain the following traits.

entries.name: Defy Death
entries: You have advantage on death saving throws.

entries.name: Hard to Kill
entries: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest.

entries.caption: Heroic Destiny
rows: I'm destined to be the most skilled practitioner of a craft or trade.
I'm destined to earn a place among the stars of Nyx.
I'm destined to become a god.
I'm destined to liberate my beloved from the clutches of the Underworld.
I was born while a kraken ravaged Meletis, and I'm destined to destroy that kraken.
I'm destined to uncover the secret of the gods' power.
